title: Reverse Subarray to Maximize Array Value
hints: Calculate the base value without any reversal first. Then, determine how reversing a specific subarray changes this total sum.
Focus on the boundary edges of the reversed subarray. The internal differences cancel out, so only the connections at the ends matter.
Derive a formula for the gain based on the four elements surrounding the reversal boundaries. Iterate through all possible split points to find the maximum gain.
